identity.name: Scran Away
identity.tagline: Good Scran. Wicked Spot. End of.
identity.story: Scran Away opened at 73 Bolton Street in Chorley town centre, serving the morning and lunchtime crowd with made-to-order breakfasts, hot and cold sandwiches, paninis, jacket potatoes, and pies. Within its first year it earned a 5/5 food hygiene rating from Chorley Council and five stars across 16 Google reviews — above both the local and national café averages. The business also runs a catering arm for offices and events. As of late May 2026 the founding partnership between Janine and Debbie is dissolving, with Janine planning to reopen independently at a new location; the five-star reputation it built is the legacy either party carries forward.

brand_voice.tone: Direct, warm, and proudly Northern — talks straight, doesn't oversell, sounds like someone who has actually cooked your breakfast.

palette.rationale: Terracotta red anchors the brand to warming, hearty food; amber pulls from golden bread crusts and a fresh mug of tea; warm cream background keeps it approachable. All foreground/background pairings clear WCAG AA contrast.

photos.caption: Full breakfast — eggs, bacon, sausage, hash browns, beans, toast

usps: 5/5 food hygiene rating — Chorley Council inspection, March 2025
Five stars on Google across 16 reviews — above both the local Chorley average (4.82) and the national café/restaurant average (4.59)
Catering for offices, meetings, and events: breakfast platters, sandwich platters, and hot food brought to your venue
Full daytime menu under one roof: breakfast, hot and cold sandwiches, paninis, jacket potatoes, pies, and drinks
Town-centre on Bolton Street — minutes from Chorley rail station
Value for money consistently called out across independent customer posts

reviews.quote: Really good price and the food is definitely worth a try.
I can report the scran was banging.

services.name: Breakfast
services.description: Full cooked breakfast served from opening

services.name: Catering
services.description: Breakfast platters, sandwich platters, and hot food options brought to your venue for meetings, events, and special occasions. Enquire via Facebook or phone.

competitors.name: Good Boyz
strengths: Immediately adjacent at 48 Bolton Street — captures passing trade on the same stretch

competitors.name: Marios Food House
strengths: Established local takeaway at 46 Bolton Street with long-standing repeat custom

competitors.name: Pall Mall Chippy
strengths: Fish and chip trade — loyal local daytime custom, different menu category

competitors.name: Subway Chorley
strengths: Online ordering via app and Just Eat

gap_matrix.label: No website
gap_matrix.note: Scran Away has a live website (dogonapc.com, built by Socialite.Design); three of four local competitors have none. Upsell target: own-domain branded site.

gap_matrix.label: No online menu
gap_matrix.note: Menu categories published on demo site; three local independents have nothing online.

gap_matrix.label: No branded email
gap_matrix.note: Demo site shows [email protected] — unconfirmed whether scranaway.co.uk is live and owned by the prospect. Verify before pitching email hosting.

gap_matrix.label: No online booking or pre-ordering
gap_matrix.note: No pre-order or booking widget on own site. A May 2026 Facebook post references Just Eat — confirm if active and whether it should be surfaced on their website.

gap_matrix.label: Low social media cadence
gap_matrix.note: Active Facebook posting into April–May 2026; TikTok @scranaway2025 (168 followers); Instagram @scranawaychorley. Three local independents show no social presence.

gap_matrix.label: Weak reviews display on site
gap_matrix.note: Demo site has a reviews section; 5★ Google (16 reviews) and 5/5 FSA hygiene cert are strong assets. Three local competitors show no reviews on their web presence.

gap_matrix.label: No competitor intelligence on site
gap_matrix.note: No comparison or differentiation copy on current template. All four surveyed competitors share this gap.

gap_matrix.label: No seasonal marketing
gap_matrix.note: No evidence of seasonal specials, holiday promotions, or event-tied campaigns in the bundle. Subway is the only exception among competitors surveyed.

gap_matrix.label: Stale brand
gap_matrix.note: Scran Away brand is recent (opened 2025) with fresh visual identity. Good Boyz and Marios Food House show absent or stale branding.

site_copy.headline: Proper Scran. Right Here in Chorley.
site_copy.subheadline: Breakfast, hot sandwiches, paninis, pies, and jacket spuds — all made fresh, all worth every penny. Bolton Street's five-star sandwich shop.
site_copy.about: Scran Away opened on Bolton Street and got it right from the off — a 5/5 food hygiene rating from Chorley Council and five stars on Google within its first year. Whether you're after a full breakfast before nine, a packed panini at noon, or a catering spread for your office team, the approach is the same: fresh ingredients, fair prices, no messing. Pop in or give us a ring.
site_copy.reviews_heading: Don't Take Our Word For It
site_copy.visit_heading: Come Find Us on Bolton Street
site_copy.footer_line: Scran Away · 73 Bolton Street, Chorley PR7 3AG · Mon–Sat 7:30am–2:30pm · Sun 9am–2pm

alerts: RE-ENGAGEMENT: dogonapc.com is our own Socialite.Design demo built during a prior cold pitch that went cold. Brief yourself on the previous pitch before any approach — do not walk in cold.

BUSINESS LIKELY CLOSED OR SPLITTING: Facebook post dated 27 May 2026 reads 'We have made the decision that Scran Away will not be reopening with myself & Debbie.' Janine plans to reopen independently at a new location; Debbie's status is unknown. Verify whether the business is currently trading before visiting. Consider pitching Janine's new independent venture rather than the existing Scran Away brand.

PHONE NUMBER CONFLICT: Storefront signage and demo site both show 01257 824763; FindGlocal (Facebook-sourced) shows 01257 576084. Both are unconfirmed in our pipeline (known_contact.phone = null). Verify the correct number with the owner before cold-calling either.
POSTCODE ERROR IN OUR DEMO: dogonapc.com shows PR7 2AG — all official sources (FSA, MapQuest, FindGlocal) confirm PR7 3AG. Flag this as a fix if pitching a rebuild.
HOURS DISCREPANCY: Our demo shows 8am–2pm Mon–Sat; FindGlocal (Facebook-sourced, April 2026) shows 7:30am–2:30pm. Bible uses FindGlocal hours as more recent — confirm on visit.
JUST EAT: A May 2026 Facebook post references Just Eat delivery. If active, this should be surfaced on the website and may support an upsell on online-ordering integration.
